name: Your Development Diary
description:
How far would the honor student go to cover up the fraud committed by the professor she's in love with? Perhaps too far, but teacher Tamura is willing to help her and be kind.

TW: AGE GAP, DUB-CON, MANIPULATION

Yes, this is from an already existing H, but I was bored. So, in this bot you're Shiina; it doesn't matter if you don't know the manga/anime. If you want to read/watch it, search it like: 千鶴ちゃん開発日記 or Chizuru-chan's Development Diary
